channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: VAR call, Argentina win raise questions of legitimacy at World Cup
item.description: Experts question political influence and the need to keep Lionel Messi's side in the World Cup amid Egypt's heartbreak.

item.title: US immigration officer shoots and kills man in Texas
item.description: Man, identified as Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, is latest to be killed by ICE officers since President Trump took power.

item.title: Argentina fans hurl beer at Egypt supporters after final whistle
item.description: A video circulating on social media shows Argentina fans throwing beer and taunting Egypt supporters in the stands.

item.title: US strikes Iran despite promised pause for Khamenei funeral
item.description: The US launches new strikes on Iran despite a promise by US President Donald Trump to pause attacks.

item.title: Unstable Manhattan skyscraper triggers collapse fears
item.description: An unstable Manhattan skyscraper has triggered a major evacuation after structural columns buckled.

item.title: How the US-Iran conflict is reshaping Africa’s geopolitical opportunities
item.description: The US-Israel war on Iran is forcing African governments to rethink their security and economic priorities.

item.title: Marine Le Pen to run for French Presidency despite criminal conviction
item.description: Marine Le Pen, the far-right French politician, announced Tuesday she is running for president next year.

item.title: Djokovic wins five-hour epic to earn Sinner showdown at Wimbledon
item.description: Gauff defeats Pegula to set up semifinal against Muchova, who overcame four-time Grand Slam champion Osaka.

item.title: Iran war live: US bombs Sirik, Qeshm, Bandar Abbas over Hormuz attacks
item.description: Explosions in Iran's Sirik, Bandar Abbas and Qeshm as US launches attacks after revoking waiver on Iranian oil exports.

item.title: Switzerland face Argentina in World Cup quarterfinal after beating Colombia
item.description: Switzerland beat Colombia on penalties in World Cup last 16 to set up quarterfinal meeting with Argentina.

item.title: Russian missiles strike Ukraine’s capital, Kyiv, for third time in a week
item.description: The attacks have triggered fires in two districts of Kyiv, according to the city's mayor.

item.title: Egypt buoyed by praise for World Cup heroics despite controversial exit
item.description: From fans in Gaza to world leaders and supporters on social media, Egypt won hearts, even if they lost to Argentina.

item.title: Egypt were ‘cheated’ in World Cup loss to Argentina, coach Hassan says
item.description: 'Perhaps they wanted to keep the world champions in the competition,' Hassan said after his team was knocked out.

item.title: US launches strikes on southern Iran, Tehran vows ‘crushing response’
item.description: US strikes in Iran come a day after Qatari, Saudi tankers hit in attacks in Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Nasdaq vs Dow: How are the key indices different as SpaceX joins one?
item.description: SpaceX joins Nasdaq-100 after IPO, bypassing traditional three-month trading rule for inclusion in the tech-heavy index.

item.title: Venezuela buries earthquake victims as death toll reaches 3,535
item.description: Mass burials have begun at La Esperanza Cemetery in Venezuela's La Guaira

item.title: Pro-Palestine MEP Rima Hassan arrives at trial for ‘glorifying terrorism’
item.description: ‘No one is safe anymore.’ This is what French MEP Rima Hassan told a crowd as she arrived at her trial in Paris.

item.title: Prolonged hospitalisation of US Republican Mitch McConnell raises questions
item.description: The senator has been hospitalised since June 14 with few details released, raising questions over his return to work.

item.title: Canadian province sues OpenAI over alleged ChatGPT-linked shooting warnings
item.description: Lawsuit claims OpenAI ignored calls to alert authorities about violent ChatGPT prompts tied to mass shooting suspect.

item.title: Trump lashes out at NATO as first day of summit wraps in Turkiye
item.description: Leaders have gathered in Ankara for a two-day summit slated to cover defence spending and the Russia-Ukraine war.

item.title: Deadly landslide buries tunnel construction site in India
item.description: At least five people were killed after a massive landslide buried a tunnel construction site in Kerala

item.title: What was the VAR controversy in the second half of Argentina vs Egypt?
item.description: A disallowed goal by VAR, a string of yellow cards for Egypt, and contrasting emotions from both captains capped the match.

item.title: Trump criticises NATO allies over Iran conflict support
item.description: US President Donald Trump criticised NATO allies for refusing to back the United States during its conflict with Iran.

item.title: ‘They brought me here to kill me’ says Gaza doctor in Israeli prison
item.description: ‘They brought me here to kill me’ says Gaza doctor in Israeli prison

item.title: France’s Marine Le Pen must wear ankle tag after appeal ruling
item.description: A French appeals court upheld Marine Le Pen's conviction for misusing European Parliament funds.
